name: Hou Yi

skills.name: Chastising Shot
skills.description: Basic Attack hits grant Attack Speed and 1 stack of enhancement.At 3 stacks, enhanced Basic Attacks shoot 3 arrows, dealing more totaldamage than a regular Basic Attack.

skills.name: Arrow Volley
skills.description: Enhances Basic Attacks for 5s to deal heavy damage. At the same time, HouYi shoots arrows to hit two other enemies in front of him, dealing 50%damage.

skills.name: Afterglow
skills.description: Inflicts damage and slow on enemies in the target area while also gaining vision of the area.

skills.name: Burning Sun Arrow
skills.description: Fires an arrow in the target direction. Deals AoE damage upon hitting a hero inflicting stun and slow.

tips: Hou Yi (Marksman): Tier S+ on international ranked — 49.28% WR.
Build core: Boots of Dexterity, Twinblades of Destruction, Vampiric Scythe.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 49.28%, pick 2.85%, ban 0.2%, popularity tier S+.
Counters Cirrus, Mulan, Xuance · Weak into Agudo, Master Luban.

faqs.question: Is Hou Yi good in current season?
faqs.answer: Hou Yi is Tier S+ Marksman with 49.28% win rate, 2.85% pick rate, and 0.2% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Hou Yi build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Boots of Dexterity, Twinblades of Destruction, Vampiric Scythe, Shadow Ripper, Eternity Blade, Doomsday. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Hou Yi?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Hou Yi: Agudo, Master Luban. Hou Yi is strong into Cirrus, Mulan, Xuance.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Cirrus, Mulan, Xuance. Countered by: Agudo, Master Luban.
